clean_text: BACARDÍ Tropical Flavoured Rum | Pineapple Coconut and Guava Flavoured Rum | BACARDÍ Global OUR RUMS OUR RUMS White Rum BACARDÍ CARTA BLANCA Flavors Flavors Range Spiced BACARDÍ Spiced Dark Rum BACARDÍ Carta Oro BACARDÍ Carta Negra BACARDÍ Añejo Cuatro BACARDÍ Reserva Ocho BACARDÍ Gran Reserva Diez BACARDÍ Gran Reserva Limitada ready to enjoy BACARDÍ x coca-cola Ready to Drink cocktails Ready to Serve cocktails BACARDÍ Coquito View all our rums Cocktails Experiences Experiences Casa BACARDÍ Puerto Rico Visit the World’s largest premium rum distillery. SUSTAINABILITY Our World FAQS BACARDÍ TROPICAL BACARDÍ LIMÓN BACARDÍ PASSIONFRUIT BACARDÍ LIME BACARDÍ COCONUT BACARDÍ DRAGONBERRY BACARDÍ RASPBERRY BACARDÍ MANGO CHILE Cocktail BACARDÍ & COLA FLAVOUR RANGE TROPICAL A perfectly balanced blend of juicy pineapple, creamy coconut and sweet guava flavours. HOW TO MAKE A TROPICAL & SODA COCKTAIL DROP THE ULTIMATE CARIBBEAN MIX AT YOUR NEXT PARTY WITH THE COMBINED ISLAND FLAVOURS OF BACARDÍ TROPICAL RUM. MAKE YOUR OWN TROPICAL & SODA 1 1/2 OZ BACARDÍ TROPICAL FLAVOURED RUM 3 OZ SODA WATER Servings Copy ingredients Copied! OUR RECOMMENDED COCKTAILS GET YOUR FLAVOUR FIX Grab a bottle from the BACARDÍ flavour range and give one of these easy cocktails a try. VIEW ALL COCKTAILS Lime & Cranberry Raspberry & Sonic Coconut Mismo DRAG TO DISCOVER MORE VIEW ALL COCKTAILS READY-TO-SERVE ON THE MOVE? Check out our ready-to-serve range. Simply pour over ice and serve for super fast flavour. EXPLORE OUR RUMS IN THE MIX From adding to cocktails to pairing with your favorite mixers. There are so many ways to drink BACARDÍ Tropical rum, to give a taste of the Caribbean! Here are some of our favorites. TROPICAL & LEMONADE TROPICAL & PINEAPPLE JUICE TROPICAL & CRANBERRY JUICE BACARDÍ & COLA TROPICAL & ORANGE JUICE SOCIAL MOVE WITH US A soft sway, or a lively dance. We have something for everyone. Follow us on social to stay up-to-date with the latest BACARDÍ news. #DoWhatMovesYou OCCASION THE HOUSE PARTY At BACARDÍ we know a thing or two about the spirit of celebration. When people gather together to express themselves and get free, magic happens. Planning a house party? Here’s our take on how to host a night that’s uniquely yours and that your guests will love. READ MORE FAQ CURIOUS ABOUT RUM? What can you mix flavoured rum with? Flavoured rum gives your taste buds an extra element of surprise. You can mix flavoured rum with a wide range of mixers, from simple cola to refreshing lemonade. Is flavoured rum sweet? Flavoured, fruity rums come in a range of tasting experiences, from soft and sweet to sour and tangy. HOW DO YOU MAKE RUM? We make rum by distilling sugarcane molasses and fermenting it with yeast and water. Rum originates from Barbados with its roots going back as far as the 17th century. related content EXPLORE BACARDÍ editorial BACARDÍ MAKES HAND SANITIZER BACARDÍ shifted a portion of production from rum distilleries in Puerto Rico to create essential… editorial ELIMINATING SINGLE-USE PLASTICS Last year we cut 50% of the single-use plastics in our gift packs – a big step towards our goal to be 100% plastic-free by 2030. editorial THE ANGEL'S SHARE A rum-inspired film by Michael B. Jordan. metadata.description: BACARDÍ Tropical Flavoured Rum is a perfectly balanced blend of juicy pineapple, creamy coconut, and sweet guava. Nothing tastes more like summer than this limited edition, authentic BACARDI Caribbean flavor that mixes well with juices and sodas.
